sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54652" key="katanthte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταντ-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n54652.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must have recourse</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐπὶ φλεβοτομίαν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg005:115" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.115</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
